rationale: In the citing paper, Pocheptsova et al. (2009) appears only once, grouped with Kahneman and Frederick (2002), to note that the source of context effects is still debated. The authors do not use this cited paper to build hypotheses, operationalize constructs, borrow methods, or interpret a specific result against it. Because the citation serves as broad background framing without a distinct functional role, it is a passing mention.
